headline: Basketball Rules and Fundamentals
description: Basketball is a 5v5 court sport invented in 1891 by Dr. James Naismith. Teams score by shooting ball through opponent's 10ft-high hoop. FIBA governs international play (Olympics, World Cup); NBA is the premier professional league. Key rules: 24-second shot clock (FIBA) / 14-second reset, 8-second backcourt rule, 5 personal fouls (FIBA) / 6 (NBA) per player.
